# Version 3.116.0
> **First stable v3 release** · Released December 2, 2024 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.116.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.116.0)

> **Supersedes [3.0.0](3.0.0.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.116.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.0/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.116.0 is the first stable v3 release, built on Skia m116 with multi-thread SIMD WebAssembly support. This release graduates the v3 preview series to stable, adding WebAssembly multi-thread/SIMD builds, Span<SKPoint> overloads for SKMatrix and SKPath, and the final Skia m116 update. All breaking changes from the v3 preview series apply — check the change list before upgrading from v2.

## Breaking Changes

- **All v2 obsolete API members removed** — Every member marked [Obsolete] in SkiaSharp 2.x has been removed. Migrate to the v3 replacements before upgrading — the compilation errors will guide you to the new APIs. ([#2539](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2539))
- **SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions uses 2.88.8 behaviour** — The encoding output for SKBitmap.Encode when called with SKPngEncoderOptions matches the 2.88.8 behaviour. Code that depended on the interim v3 preview behaviour should verify output. ([#3014](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3014))

## Engine

- **Skia updated to m116** — The bundled Skia engine is at milestone m116, bringing upstream rendering improvements, bug fixes, and the latest Skia features. — ❤️ [@Redth](https://github.com/Redth) ([#2829](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2829), [#2885](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2885), [#3026](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3026))

## API Surface

- **Span<SKPoint> overloads for SKMatrix and SKPath** — SKMatrix.MapPoints, MapVectors, and SKPath.AddPoly now have Span<SKPoint> overloads for allocation-free batch transforms. — ❤️ [@alexandrvslv](https://github.com/alexandrvslv) ([#3030](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3030))
- **SKBlender, Skottie animation builder, and new picture APIs** — SKBlender exposes custom blend modes; the Skottie animation builder enables Lottie playback; SKPicture gains additional APIs. ([#2830](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2830), [#2630](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2630), [#2883](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2883))
- **SKImage.ToRawShader, color filter spans, and GetPixelSpan offsets** — New convenience APIs include ToRawShader on SKImage, Span overloads on color filter factories, and offset parameters on GetPixelSpan. ([#2748](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2748), [#2879](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2879), [#2609](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2609))
- **SKFilterQuality compatibility overloads added** — Compatibility overloads for the removed SKFilterQuality enum are provided to ease migration. — ❤️ [@Youssef1313](https://github.com/Youssef1313) ([#2963](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2963))
- **Metal APIs unified across .NET TFMs** — Metal-specific APIs for GRBackendRenderTarget are now available on a single .NET TFM, simplifying cross-platform Metal code. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#2788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2788))
- **R-Tree overload for SKPicture.BeginRecording added** — An overload of BeginRecording that uses an R-Tree spatial index is now available for improved rendering performance on complex scenes. ([#2889](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2889))

## Bug Fixes

- **AccessViolationException when disposing cloned SKPaint fixed** — Disposing a cloned SKPaint was causing an access violation due to incorrect native ownership tracking; this is now corrected. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid) ([#2904](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2904))
- **Memory leaks in MAUI views fixed** — Several native handle leaks in MAUI's SKCanvasView and SKGLView have been resolved. ([#2955](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2955))
- **Metal Snapshot returning magenta on Apple platforms fixed** — SKSurface.Snapshot was returning a magenta image when using the Metal backend; colour space handling is now correct. — ❤️ [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#2804](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2804))
- **GetKerningPairAdjustments API corrected** — The native call signature for GetKerningPairAdjustments was wrong, causing incorrect kerning values; this is now fixed. — ❤️ [@pdjonov](https://github.com/pdjonov) ([#2858](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2858))
- **Uno and WASM canvas rendering fixes** — Uno Skia canvas context activation, WASM canvas null-safety, and correct Bgra8888 format for SKXamlCanvas on Uno are all addressed. — ❤️ [@jeromelaban](https://github.com/jeromelaban), [@Youssef1313](https://github.com/Youssef1313) ([#2559](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2559), [#2563](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2563), [#2918](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2918))
- **SKXamlCanvas XamlRoot null reference fixed** — SKXamlCanvas no longer throws a NullReferenceException when XamlRoot is null during unload. — ❤️ [@jeromelaban](https://github.com/jeromelaban) ([#2854](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2854))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **LibraryImport and function pointers for faster P/Invoke** — The native interop layer uses LibraryImport source generators and function pointers, reducing managed-to-native call overhead and improving AoT compatibility. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#2917](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2917))

## Platform

- **Multi-thread and SIMD WebAssembly builds added** — WebAssembly targets now support multi-threaded and SIMD execution modes, enabling significant performance gains in browser and WASM environments. ([#2620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2620))
- **WinUI, WPF GL, Blazor DPI, and WinForms GLControl added** — Hardware-accelerated views for WinUI 3 and WPF, DPI-aware Blazor components, and updated WinForms GLControl packages are all included. — ❤️ [@gmurray81](https://github.com/gmurray81), [@beto-rodriguez](https://github.com/beto-rodriguez) ([#2733](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2733), [#2317](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2317), [#1832](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/1832), [#2989](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2989))
- **Metal backend on Mac Catalyst and Apple platform improvements** — Mac Catalyst uses the Metal backend by default; Metal APIs are unified across .NET TFMs; Metal Snapshot colour fix is included. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6), [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#2747](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2747), [#2788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2788), [#2804](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2804))
- **nosimd WASM builds restored for security-sensitive environments** — Non-SIMD WebAssembly builds are restored for environments requiring edge-enhanced security or Safari compatibility. — ❤️ [@jeromelaban](https://github.com/jeromelaban) ([#2612](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2612))

## Security

- **Native dependencies updated** — HarfBuzz updated to 8.3.0, WebP to 1.3.2, libjpeg-turbo to 2.1.5.1, .NET updated to 8.0. ([#2624](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2624), [#2622](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2622), [#2699](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2699), [#2927](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2927))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0

Ships HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0 with the v3 stable foundation including LibraryImport P/Invoke, .NET 8 support, and new WebAssembly platform coverage.

## Preview 6 (November 5, 2024)

Preview 6 added multi-thread/SIMD WebAssembly support, Span<SKPoint> overloads for SKMatrix and SKPath, and the final Skia m116 update.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.5.4...v3.116.0-preview.6.1)

## Preview 5 (October 24, 2024)

Preview 5 of 3.0.0 stabilized the release with LibraryImport/function pointers, SKFilterQuality compat overloads, .NET 8 update, and ANGLE support.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.4.1...v3.0.0-preview.5.4)

## Preview 4 (July 18, 2024)

Preview 4 of 3.0.0 fixed the SKPaint dispose AVE, MAUI memory leaks, Uno/WASM canvas bugs, and added SKBlender and expanded SKPicture APIs.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.3.1...v3.0.0-preview.4.1)

## Preview 3 (April 9, 2024)

Preview 3 of 3.0.0 added the Metal Mac Catalyst backend, WPF SKGLElement, and Metal Snapshot colour fix.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.2.1...v3.0.0-preview.3.1)

## Preview 2 (February 20, 2024)

Preview 2 of 3.0.0 introduced the Skottie animation builder, SKImage.ToRawShader, and MSVC build support.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.1.8...v3.0.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (February 6, 2024)

Preview 1 of 3.0.0 established the v3 foundation: WinUI and WPF views, Blazor DPI, HarfBuzz 8.3.0, and removal of all v2 obsoletes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v2.88.9...v3.0.0-preview.1.8)
